response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:17: Identified 'Dawn Blue' performed by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope. Lyrics found. 2. 03:17-03:35: Transition scene. 3. 03:35-05:00: Identified '罪と蜜' performed by Mori Calliope and syudou. Lyrics could not be retrieved from search tool.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Mori Calliope. The first performance is 'Dawn Blue' with Tokino Sora. The second is '罪と蜜' (Tsumi to Mitsu) with syudou.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Dawn Blue' by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope. The stage is decorated with large crystals, and they are dancing while singing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
つかまえて、ほら
このshooting star
a world of our fiction awaits...
ずっと同じ毎日に迷いがあっても
気づかないふりをしてたんだ
ほんの少しの勇気がまだ出せなくって
まどろむ宇宙で彷徨っていた
夜空に浮かぶ
星に願いをかけるんだ
i hope 抱いている夢を
絶対諦めたく無い
走り出すから
追いかけて今
あのshooting star
見たことのないストーリー
進んでいくんだ
いつの日にかきっと
描いたセカイへ
辿り着けるように
let go
of the days you thought mattered so
life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long?
もっと誰でもない自分になりたいんだ
新しい風が心を揺らした
it takes something to believe
the wish we were promised could really come to life
and so, if this how the story goes
to find that strength inside, I'll remember why back then
you took my hand, and you said
つかまえて、ほら このshooting star
さあ、まずは一歩踏み出して恐れずにゆこう
いつの日にかきっと
まだ見ぬ世界へ辿り着けるように
夜明けに咲いた月が眩いブルーの空に溶けてく
you and I, an undecided future
doesn't matter if the final truth hurts
もうすぐ朝が動き出すから
抱きしめて 今 このshooting star
見たことのないストーリー
I'll be here betting on that
fearsome heart
'cause you're that shooting star
it's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
into the darkness, you'll find me
running by your side until the dawn
in the end, it's you and me
us against tomorrow
face the world that we had dreamed
dry your eyes, and don't look back
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Catch it, look,
This shooting star
A world of our fiction awaits...
Even if there's hesitation in the same daily routine,
I pretended not to notice.
I couldn't quite muster a little bit of courage,
And was wandering in a drowsy universe.
I make a wish on the star floating in the night sky,
I hope... for the dream I'm holding,
I definitely don't want to give up, because I'll start running.
Chasing after now, that shooting star,
I'll advance into a story I've never seen before.
Someday, for sure,
So that I can reach the world I depicted.
Let go
Of the days you thought mattered so,
Life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in.
Is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long?
I want to become a self that is more than anyone else,
A new breeze shook my heart.
It takes something to believe,
The wish we were promised could really come to life.
And so, if this is how the story goes,
To find that strength inside, I'll remember why back then,
You took my hand, and you said...
Catch it, look, this shooting star,
Come on, first take one step forward and go without fear.
Someday, for sure,
So that I can reach the world I haven't seen yet.
The moon that bloomed at dawn is melting into the dazzling blue sky.
You and I, an undecided future,
Doesn't matter if the final truth hurts.
Because the morning will move soon.
Hold it now, this shooting star,
The story I've never seen,
I'll be here betting on that
Fearsome heart
'Cause you're that shooting star
It's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
Into the darkness, you'll find me
Running by your side until the dawn
In the end, it's you and me
Us against tomorrow
Face the world that we had dreamed
Dry your eyes, and don't look back.

scenes.description: Performance of '罪と蜜' by Mori Calliope and syudou. They are on a floating diamond platform in a crystalline environment.
